author: Zaheer Anwari
headline: New York Times Sues OpenAI and Microsoft - AI Copyright Infringement Amid 54% Stock Surge
summary:
The New York Times has filed a lawsuit against OpenAI and Microsoft, alleging copyright infringement related to the use of its content by ChatGPT.
	The New York Times argues that ChatGPT's ability to generate similar or exact content has led to direct competition, affecting its subscription and advertising revenues.

author: Piero Cingari
headline: AI Revolution, Fed's Pivot Power US Stock Market To A Record Year: This Week In Markets
summary:
The U.S. stock market bids farewell to a truly unforgettable year, characterized by the artificial intelligence revolution, which defied numerous gloomy forecasts made at the year’s outset.



All the major U.S. indices concluded the year either at or near unprecedented highs, driven by a robust surge in the final two months of 2023.
